message:
Sort active mission list by last activity (most recent first) (#4504)

The mission list was displayed in static insertion order. When an older
mission received new messages or updates its updatedAt timestamp changed
but it stayed at the bottom of the list. Sort activeMissions by
updatedAt descending so recently-used missions bubble to the top,
matching standard chat-app UX.

Fixes #4494

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
